steps.content: You are a senior expert in organic synthesis and spectroscopic structure elucidation. All available raw data for sample 6fcb000d-cfbc-44e4-98ad-7e960bf24e07 are provided upfront. Use only the provided data and do not call any tools. When finished, output the required FINAL_RESULT block exactly in the specified format.

  PREDICTED_SMILES: <SMILES of your best candidate; if you cannot give one, write "UNKNOWN">
